title: 異世界拷問官 〜忠犬女騎士リリアの甘美なる屈服〜
description:
[ Isekai × Pleasure-Magic Adult Visual Novel ]

In a soundproofed dungeon beneath the victorious empire, a new prisoner is dragged before you: Sir Lillia, the proud knight-commander of the fallen kingdom — a "loyal hound" who swore she would never kneel.

But the cheat skill you were granted upon your reincarnation isn't pain. It's Pleasure Magic. No torture. No cruelty. Only ecstasy she cannot resist — peeling away her pride, her loyalty, and her heart one layer at a time.

"You think a weakling like you could ever make me submit?"

Watch the haughty knight who once looked down on you slowly come undone — until she's grinding her own hips, drenched in sweat and tears, begging you to call her your own.

■ A proud silver-haired knight's gradual fall From her arrogant resistance in the prologue to her sweetly devoted self in the epilogue, every episode marks a clear, intoxicating step deeper into her surrender.

■ Pleasure only — no pain, no grimdark Zero cruelty, no gore. A purely erotic, satisfying conquest won through pleasure alone.

■ Sweat-soaked artwork Every CG emphasizes glistening sweat, dripping skin, and feverish heat for maximum sensual realism.

■ One focused theme per episode Each chapter dives deep into a single, intensely-detailed scenario, building from teasing to total devotion.

■ Full Japanese voice acting Hear her voice shift from defiant pride, to trembling confusion, to sweet and broken submission.

■ Featured acts Voyeurism & light bondage / nipple & breast teasing / fellatio (deepthroat & cum-swallowing) / paizuri (titjob) & facials / aphrodisiac play / anal / cowgirl riding / vaginal & anal creampies / heavy squirting / ahegao / a relentless sweat fetish throughout — building scene by scene from teasing resistance to total, willing devotion.

[ Volume ]

• 9 episodes (Prologue → Epilogue)

• Approx. 3–4 hours of playtime

• 60+ event CGs with abundant variations (expressions, sweat, fluids, and more)

• Single route — a complete "fully fallen" happy ending

This game is intended for adults only (18+). All characters depicted are 18 years of age or older. Voice acting is in Japanese; text is available in 30 languages.
description_short: Reincarnated into another world, you're granted one cheat skill: Pleasure Magic. No pain, no violence — only inescapable ecstasy to break a proud captive knight into a willing, hip-grinding mess. A sweat-soaked, fully Japanese-voiced adult visual novel of sweet surrender.
